textByHashes.53d9c9b6b94eec2e07fa1235280105cee83aa959: You like my armour? If you let me go, I'll let you keep it!
textByHashes.08f160cb7d8fb6b4f1a7dcbe2c2492c08533d8c6: You can have that too! Just let me go!
textByHashes.de6773b6a694f3eaad5fab959e93c16b2c3d9ffb: No! I-I- I grew that myself!
textByHashes.bd3305a11948cf775945232d447c8bf2152ff0f5: You can get the gout tuber from Tai Bwo Wannai Village. Go there and ask Murcaily. Then you plant it in a farming patch.
